scene_summary.scene_description: G3 Jingtai Expressway in Beijing, camera facing south at K3+303. Divided highway with 3 lanes each direction separated by green anti-glare barriers. White car stopped on left emergency lane with trunk open (possible breakdown). Light traffic with cars and one truck visible moving in both directions. Sound barriers present on right side. Timestamp shows 14:38 on April 1, 2026.
